question:
Round 1 | Target: Intent | Ambiguity: 100%

Who is this MVP primarily for first: clinicians, patients, or an internal sales/demo audience? This decides the wording, compliance posture, and MVP scope.

options.label: Patients
options.description: Patient-facing, plain language and stronger safety wording

options.label: Sales demo / internal
options.description: Demo-first, optimized for speed and clarity
